series_metadata.series_description: Hospitals may appeal the payment amount of their bill by submitting supporting documentation and justification for any changes. The Hospital Reimbursement Review (HRR) Unit reviews the appeal and issues a response to the hospital via email or in letter form.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain the Hospital Reimbursement Appeals in the HRR Unit for 2 years after resolution, provided audited by the Auditor of State, audit report is release, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain the Hospital Reimbursement Appeals in the HRR Unit for 2 years after resolution, provided audited by the Auditor of State, audit report is release, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
